plugin.label: Withdrawal button
Widerrufsbutton
plugin.author: onlineshop.consulting
plugin.description: Provides an online withdrawal form and configurable withdrawal buttons throughout the storefront, in compliance with EU Directive 2023/2673.
Stellt ein Online-Widerrufsformular und Widerrufs-Buttons gemäß EU-Richtlinie 2023/2673 bereit.
